case_title: WEI RAO et al VS. JUNE TSENG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALEX ANOLIK. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS FILED. NOTHING REPORTED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA (506)
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT TSENG, JUNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2010 - JUDGMENT
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF DEBORAH RIASCOS - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAO, WEI RIASCOS, DEBORAH DBA ZEN INTERIORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSENG, JUNE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY RAO, WEI RIASCOS, DEBORAH DBA ZEN INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, JUNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALEX ANOLIK. FILED BY RAO, WEI RIASCOS, DEBORAH DBA ZEN INTERIORS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TSENG, JUNE HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNE TSENG IS GRANTED. PARTIES STIPULATED FOR A TRIAL TODAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAO, WEI RIASCOS, DEBORAH DBA ZEN INTERIORS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TSENG, JUNE BASED ON THE TESTIMONY OF THE PARTIES, INCLUDING PLATINIFF'S PREVIOUS EXAMINATION OF THE ITEM AND PLAINTIFFS WERE ON INQUIRY NOTICE CONCERNING TO AGE OF THE ITEM AND DID NOT REASONABLY RELY ON ANY REPRESENTATION BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
